title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: October 24, 2024
summary: October 24, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to increase this week with a very hefty and greater rate of 20.19% (as opposed to last week’s increase rate of 9.31%), from the level on 10/17/2024 of 5.674 M km 2 to 7.109 M km 2 for this week. In the time that I have been doing this monitoring, I...
